executive_summary: Build attempt #1 failed due to GitHub Actions workflow dispatch error. No Maven build was executed as the workflow could not be triggered successfully.

errors.description: Failed to dispatch GitHub Actions workflow with HTTP 500 Internal Server Error
errors.error_message: HTTP Error 500: Internal Server Error. Failed to run workflow dispatch
errors.root_cause: GitHub API returned 500 error when attempting to trigger workflow dispatch event
errors.impact: Build cannot be executed - workflow was never started
recommended_fix: Verify GitHub Actions workflow file exists at .github/workflows/build.yml
Check workflow file syntax and YAML formatting
Verify repository permissions and GitHub token has 'actions:write' scope
Check GitHub Actions service status at https://www.githubstatus.com/
Retry the workflow dispatch after a brief delay
If persistent, contact GitHub Support or check repository settings

automated_remediation.compliance_notes: Workflow dispatch failures must be logged for audit trail. Retry attempts should be rate-limited per GitHub API guidelines.

errors.compliance_impact: HIGH - Build process cannot proceed, blocking CI/CD pipeline

next_steps: Verify workflow configuration file exists and is valid
Validate repository permissions and token scopes
